description_long: This is a two-story light blue house with a gable roof and white trim, surrounded by stylized leafy trees. The house features multiple arched and rectangular windows, some with decorative muntins, and a prominent front porch with white railings and columns. The upper floor includes a balcony with a blue-and-white checkered floor, visible from several angles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal siding, and the roof is steeply pitched with dormer windows. The property is bordered by a white picket fence and includes outdoor furniture such as chairs and a table. The overall design is quaint and residential, evoking a cozy suburban or small-town setting.
description: A charming two-story light blue house with a gable roof, white trim, arched windows, a front porch, and surrounding stylized trees. Features include a balcony, picket fence, and outdoor furniture.
description_view_0: Front and partial side view showing the main porch, arched windows, balcony with checkered floor, and two large stylized trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, upper balcony, and symmetrical window arrangement, with trees flanking the house.
description_view_2: Rear and side view displaying the back porch, additional windows, and more of the house's outdoor area and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof, rear windows, and outdoor furniture near the trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a white door with arched windows, a covered porch with columns, and decorative railings.
